action_density.claim_boundary: The source-traced symbolic density is not an action-derived theorem.
action_density.missing_object: action-derived measure, locality theorem, variation, and EOM effect

artifact_name: BHSM CP O_int Symbolic Action Candidate

boundary_factor.claim_boundary: The boundary symbol is source-traced but not an action-derived operator.
boundary_factor.missing_object: boundary-to-action projection theorem and defined integration measure

claim_boundary: The symbolic field/action candidate localizes the gap but is not action-level closure.

coupling_factor.claim_boundary: No W anchor, PDG value, or calibration fixes the symbolic coefficient.
coupling_factor.coupling_mass_dimension: must make the action density dimension four; value not derived
coupling_factor.missing_object: normalized coupling and operator/coupling mass dimensions from the action
coupling_factor.source: existing symbolic 4D assembly ledger coefficient symbol

field_factor.claim_boundary: The generic psi symbol is a symbolic placeholder, not a production field definition.
field_factor.missing_object: action-derived physical field representation with chirality, family indices, and conjugation rules
field_factor.representation: abstract boundary/interface field only; physical representation not derived

gauge_factor.claim_boundary: The symbolic projector does not close X_ch or the neutrino theorem.
gauge_factor.missing_object: action-derived gauge representation, sector projectors, and forbidden-channel proof

lorentz_factor.claim_boundary: A scalar wrapper requirement is not a derived Lorentz operator.
lorentz_factor.cp_sensitive_structure: complex phase multiplies O_int and its conjugate
lorentz_factor.missing_object: action-derived spinor/vector/tensor contraction and CP transformation law
lorentz_factor.source: Sprint C symbolic constraint informed by artifact missing-item ledger

phase_factor.claim_boundary: An artifact-backed phase is not a standalone interaction.

symbolic_callable.claim_boundary: This callable assembles a symbolic candidate; it is not a production theorem callable.
